item.title: FreqCPU [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: FreqCPU [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: vallie038
item.itunes:summary:
FreqCPU
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
FreqCPU is a module that can tweak your CPU and GPU frequency performance with no special permission like adb or superuser! FreqCPU was created by Sunshine, on 1 January 2024 at 4:06 PM
FreqCPU is not 100% completed so it's not perfectly working! Don't have high expectations because this script is non-root, FreqCPU is included with an additional function for cooling down CPU temperature in Android

CoolENG is a module for Android that can aggressively cool down CPU temperature with a specific guide that users ( you ) have to follow for the best results, CoolENG, or the full name "Cool ENGINE" needs special permission, like adb or root for the script to run, CoolENG is included with a function that can change some android properties for making a background limit only for 1 apps, brightness to 0%, and changing performance mode to power save mode!


By IAV projects & sunshine
[read more]
item.description:
FreqCPU
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
FreqCPU is a module that can tweak your CPU and GPU frequency performance with no special permission like adb or superuser! FreqCPU was created by Sunshine, on 1 January 2024 at 4:06 PM
FreqCPU is not 100% completed so it's not perfectly working! Don't have high expectations because this script is non-root, FreqCPU is included with an additional function for cooling down CPU temperature in Android

CoolENG is a module for Android that can aggressively cool down CPU temperature with a specific guide that users ( you ) have to follow for the best results, CoolENG, or the full name "Cool ENGINE" needs special permission, like adb or root for the script to run, CoolENG is included with a function that can change some android properties for making a background limit only for 1 apps, brightness to 0%, and changing performance mode to power save mode!


By IAV projects & sunshine
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
FreqCPU
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
FreqCPU is a module that can tweak your CPU and GPU frequency performance with no special permission like adb or superuser! FreqCPU was created by Sunshine, on 1 January 2024 at 4:06 PM
FreqCPU is not 100% completed so it's not perfectly working! Don't have high expectations because this script is non-root, FreqCPU is included with an additional function for cooling down CPU temperature in Android

CoolENG is a module for Android that can aggressively cool down CPU temperature with a specific guide that users ( you ) have to follow for the best results, CoolENG, or the full name "Cool ENGINE" needs special permission, like adb or root for the script to run, CoolENG is included with a function that can change some android properties for making a background limit only for 1 apps, brightness to 0%, and changing performance mode to power save mode!


By IAV projects & sunshine
[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".

item.title: Bulk SMS Marketing Software Blackberry [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Marketing Software Blackberry [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsmobile
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Marketing Software Blackberry
(Internet Apps)
www.bulksmsmobilemarketing.com website to download Bulk SMS Marketing Software Blackberry broadcast business campaigns from computer in both English and non English Unicode characters. Group text messaging software enables user to send unlimited text message from blackberry mobile phone via laptop. Mass text sms broadcasting software is capable to promote your business by sending sound alert in any time around the world.

[read more]

item.title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: meoify
item.itunes:summary:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]

Moto Widget

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

item.content:encoded:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!

item.title: Android Mobile Messaging Program [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Android Mobile Messaging Program [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsmobile
item.itunes:summary:
Android Mobile Messaging Program
(Internet Apps)
Compatible to Windows operating system Android Mobile Messaging Program allows user to send bulk text messages from PC connected with android mobile phone. Highly economical and effective bulk SMS sending software helps user to compose and forward Unicode text language format messages via computer system in simplified manner. Simple and user friendly mobile SMS sending application supports Unicode language to send bulk messages in any text format in simplified way.

[read more]

item.title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"

Company website URL www.bulksmsmobilemarketing.com offers new release and cost effective SMS Marketing Software which is beneficial for all small to large scale business industries to increase their sales and build brand awareness to send multiple messages from PC via connecting android technology based cell phone device. item.title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
[read more]

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
